---
name: Question
about: Ask for help, guidance, or clarification
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

## What are you trying to do?
Describe your goal clearly.

## What have you tried?
List the steps you already attempted.

## What happened?
Share output, errors, or unexpected behavior.

## What did you expect?
Describe the outcome you wanted.

## Context
Add relevant environment details, links, or screenshots.
